summary: Completed full backend (pytest) + frontend (Playwright) testing of DataOS landing page. All backend endpoints (/api/, /api/health, POST /api/leads, GET /api/leads) work correctly with proper validation. All interactive elements (hero CTAs, navbar CTA, lifecycle diagram, sticky CTA, lead form modal/submission, differentiators, solution register, final CTA buttons) work end-to-end. Lead form submission persists to MongoDB and returns sheet_synced=false as expected (webhook intentionally unconfigured). MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from list response. Note: a few testid names in the actual code differ from the names listed in the review request spec — features are implemented but with slightly different testids.
action_items: OPTIONAL/NAMING: Review request expects testids 'outcomes-section', 'footer-section', 'final-cta-briefing-btn', 'final-cta-expert-btn'. Code uses 'business-outcomes-section', 'footer', 'final-executive-briefing-btn', 'final-expert-btn'. Functionality is fine; either align spec or rename testids for consistency with the review request.
MINOR (cosmetic): Documentation/spec alignment only — no user-facing impact.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses synchronous `requests` library inside asyncio.to_thread for the Sheets webhook — fine, but consider httpx.AsyncClient for cleaner async.
list_leads converts ISO timestamp string back to datetime in a loop on every call — small overhead but acceptable for current volume.
Pydantic `EmailStr` import requires `email-validator` package; confirmed installed and working (422 returned on invalid emails).
LeadFormModal: handleClose uses 250ms setTimeout to reset submitted/form state — could cause race if user reopens modal within 250ms after closing the success state.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes — good. Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional flows (all CTAs open modal, lifecycle stages update, sticky CTA appears, form submits + success state shown)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed leads via POST /api/leads during testing (TEST_Tester One, TEST_Tester Two, TEST_PW User). Stored in MongoDB leads collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are at /app/backend/tests/test_dataos_api.py; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Google Sheets webhook intentionally empty; do NOT set GOOGLE_SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL. All sections render and all CTAs open the LeadFormModal correctly. Confirmed real selectors: 'business-outcomes-section', 'footer', 'final-executive-briefing-btn', 'final-expert-btn' (not the names in the review request).
rca of the issue: No production issue. The only 'failures' in the first Playwright run were due to testid name mismatches between the review request text and the actual implementation — re-running with the actual code testids passes every flow.
